title: A UFO spotted near an airstrip in Manaus Air Base  [2015]
excerpt: JULY 4th, 2015. text_preview: JULY 4th, 2015. Under a clear sky, around 01h40 in the morning, an operator at the Manaus Air Base Tower spotted an object without a defined shape and in a static position, resembling medium intensity lights. The object was seen in the vicinity of one of the airfield’s airstrips. As the official report informs, there was a video and image recording made by cell phone, attached to the occurrence file, but they were not made available to the AN’s UFO Fund. The observations of those who took the testimony of the eyewitness are as follows: “THE OPERATOR OF THE HOUR REPORTED A SIGHTING OF AN OBJECT
summary: Tower operator at Manaus Air Base saw a static medium-intensity light near runway 09 that disappeared and triggered a primary radar return on 4 Jul 2015.
